name: python3-ip2proxy
title: python3-ip2proxy
description:
Python API for IP2Proxy database (Python 3)
This library allows user to query an IP address if it was being used as open
proxy, web proxy, VPN anonymizer and TOR exits. It lookup the proxy IP address
from IP2Proxy BIN Data file.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ip2proxy because Python API for IP2Proxy database (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ip2proxy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ip2proxy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ip2proxy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
